title: Jurnie Crawford’s CV
text:
Business Analyst | Student

My LinkedIn





SQL • Power BI • Spreadsheet Analysis • Meta Business Suite • RStudio
Data Tools: Python (Polars), Statistical Modeling (ANOVA), Data Cleaning







Related Courses: Business Spreadsheets, Intro to Databases, SQL for Analysts, Financial Accounting, Finance Management, Intermediate Statistics.







Alliance Home Health and Hospice | Idaho Falls, ID * Built a Google Sheets tracking system to reduce duplicate doctor office visits by 20-30%, enabling outreach to new offices and expanding referral sources. * Coordinated with facilities management to schedule 3 community events at assisted living centers; one led to a recurring monthly partnership and expanded outreach opportunities. * Maximized a $600/month budget to support multiple outreach initiatives, enabling events to strengthen community ties.



White Pass Yukon Route Railroad | Skagway, AK * Coordinated 20+ tour guides daily to assigned train cars, driving consistent, timely departures. * Utilized Microsoft Excel to design and plan daily boarding and seating plans for up to 2,000 passengers, balancing ADA individuals and tour directors to ensure a timely departure. * Reviewed 50+ dispatch schedules per day, guaranteeing precise tour-to-train coordination.



Allyson Kelly Associates (AKA) | Remote * Produced 3–5 posts per week by developing and executing a social media plan that launched AKA’s online presence and increased engagement. * Designed and optimized social media content to drive website traffic, aligning posts with organizational goals and strengthening digital presence. * Leveraged social media platforms to create a new avenue for client engagement, generating opportunities for outreach and potential partnerships.
